rulings.Case Title: BEVERLY JORDISON et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 23, 2011 in Department 220 at 10:45 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Tosco Corp.¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. Mr. Jeffress¿ deposition testimony and declaration create a triable issue whether Mr. Jordison was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials attributable to defendant. Defendant¿s objections to Mr. Jeffress¿ declaration are overruled. The hearing on this motion will be at 10:45am, not 9:30am. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: LLOYD KENDRICK et al VS. BORGWARNER, INC. INDIVIDUALLY AND AS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Add American Honda Motor Co., Inc. As A Defendant
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 23, 2011 in Department 220 at 11:30 a.m., Line 3. PLAINTIFFS LLOYD KENDRICK, JAMES KENDRICK, GARY RHEINOR, RONALD RHEINOR, CONNIE WATSON'S motion to add American Honda Motor Co., Inc. as a defendant is granted on the following conditions that must be agreed to by plaintiffs and, if not, the motion is denied: the newly added defendant may file a summary motion on or before July 6, 2011 with plaintiffs¿ opposition due by July 18, 2011 and any reply papers due by July 25, 2011 with a hearing date of July 28, 2011. The hearing on this motion will be at 11:30am, not 9:30am. = (220/HEK)
